answers: Start skiing: take a lesson (essential!), rent gear first, start on green/easy runs, and practice snowplow turns.
Skiing tips: lean forward (not back!), bend knees, look where you want to go, and take breaks when tired.
Best ski resorts: Alps (France/Switzerland), Colorado (US), Niseko (Japan), Whistler (Canada), Banff (Canada).
Gear basics: rent skis, boots, poles, and helmet for first time. Buy your own boots first if you continue (fit matters most).
